[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111111 7
1 010110001 4
2 101001010 4
3 001100101 4
4 011111101 7
5 010000011 3
6 010110111 6
7 011000001 3

01 10 011110111 7
12 21 011111111 8
23 32 011111111 8
34 43 111111011 8
45 54 101101111 7
56 65 011111101 7 match 4
67 76 011111111 8
70 07 010110111 6 match 6

02 20 011111111 8
13 31 011110001 5
24 42 101111111 8
35 53 011110101 6
46 64 111111111 a
57 75 011100111 6
60 06 011111111 8
71 17 011000011 4

03 30 010110111 6 match 6
14 41 111001011 6
25 52 001111111 7 match 0
36 63 011111101 7 match 4
47 74 111001011 6
50 05 011110111 7
61 16 011111101 7 match 4
72 27 011111111 8

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 011100101 5
26 62 011111111 8
37 73 010110011 5
